home.welcome_text:
We are so happy you are here!
Our wedding day is fast approaching, and we are excited to share all the details with you.
Take a look around to find all the details about our celebration,
from the venue to the schedule and more.
home.tips_subtitle: Click below to check detailed recommendations by the bride and groom:

registry.title: Registry
registry.intro: We're so excited to share this special moment with you! We've put together this gift list to make things easier in case you'd like to give us something - but what truly matters is having you with us on this unforgettable day!
registry.fabricario_desc: (For guests in Brazil) Authentic and naturally sophisticated objects to inspire the art of hosting.
registry.experiences_desc: (For guests in Brazil) Special selection from the bride and groom
registry.cb2_desc: (For guests in the US) High-design aesthetic with a boutiquelike attitude and creative edge.

checkout.success_message: Thank you very much for the gift!!
checkout.message_placeholder: Deixe uma mensagem para os noivos!

travel_tips.tips_intro: The wedding will take place in the city of Gramado, in the state of Rio Grande do Sul - the southernmost state in Brazil, and where the bride and groom were born. It’s a part of the “Serra Gaúcha”, a mountainous area whose architecture, gastronomy and culture is heavily influenced by its German and Italian roots. The city is a widely known tourist destination in Brazil, with multiple options for fun activities, sightseeing, restaurants and hospitality.
travel_tips.hotels_caption: We suggest hotels in Downtown Gramado so you can enjoy the city. They'll be about 20min from the location - there's Uber service in the city and we'll arrange transportation for the way back.

rsvp.phone_description: Will be used to get in touch with you if needed
rsvp.phone_contact_opt_in: I want to receive SMS/Whatsapp messages with info about the wedding
rsvp.success_message: We're so happy to share this moment with you!
rsvp.error_message: Huh... Gennaro must have done something wrong in the website...

message_us.leave_a_message_placeholder: Make sure to include songs you would like to add to the wedding playlist!

dress_code.title: Dress Code
dress_code.intro_text: We kindly ask our guests to dress in *formal attire*. The ceremony will take place outdoors, followed by an indoor reception.
dress_code.women_text: Long dresses. Stiletto heels are not recommended due to the outdoor setting. As temperatures may drop in the evening, we suggest bringing a warm wrap.
dress_code.men_text: Full suit with shirt and tie.

login.forgot_password_description: Enter your email and we'll send a code to reset your password.
login.enter_code_description: Enter the code sent to {{email}} and your new password.
login.force_new_password_description: You need to set a new password to continue.
login.signup_otp_description: Enter the verification code sent to {{email}}.
login.password_reset_success_description: You can now log in with your new password.

timeline_items.title: Appeared on local news
timeline_items.description: After having their car stolen, appeared on local news
